sizing_rule.note: Rebalance portfolio allocation every 3 months by recalculating optimal f for each market system, then normalize allocations across all systems by dividing each system's optimal f (in dollars) by the sum of all optimal f values. Recalculate inter-market correlations at each rebalancing. This is a multi-system portfolio optimization approach using Ralph Vince's optimal f framework applied dynamically.

source_rule_text: Rebalance optimal portfolio allocation every 3 months to adjust position sizes across multiple market systems based on their optimal f values and inter-market relationships.
